meta.description: Labeled evaluation cases: data pipeline integrity (20 cases) + LLM facility extraction faithfulness (10 cases). Ground-truth answers from Census, FRED, yfinance, BLS, and verified news articles.

cases.description: Texas is a top-3 migration destination state

expected.ground_truth: TX composite_score > 90
expected.source: US Census Bureau Population Estimates 2023 — TX population growth +1.6-2.1% YoY

cases.description: Florida is a top-3 migration destination state

expected.ground_truth: FL composite_score > 85
expected.source: US Census Bureau — FL consistent top-3 inbound state

cases.description: California shows net outbound migration (low score)

expected.ground_truth: CA biz_score = 18 (net corporate outflows)
expected.source: US Census Bureau — CA net domestic outmigration since 2020

cases.description: Migration data returns all 50 states + DC

expected.ground_truth: 51 states/territories

cases.description: Composite score formula: 60% pop growth + 40% biz score

expected.ground_truth: Score follows documented formula

cases.description: Industrial cap rate benchmark is 5.6%

expected.ground_truth: 5.6% per platform benchmark table

cases.description: Office has highest cap rate among all property types

expected.ground_truth: Office 8.5% is highest; Data Center 4.8% is lowest

cases.description: REIT universe contains expected tickers

expected.condition: contains PLD, EQR, SPG, BXP, WELL, PSA, EQIX
expected.ground_truth: 7 anchor REITs present across all property types

cases.description: REIT prices are positive and within reasonable range

expected.ground_truth: No REIT trades above $2000 or at $0 (EQIX trades ~$1050)

cases.description: Fed Funds Rate is within plausible range

expected.ground_truth: Fed Funds has been 0-5.5% in modern era

cases.description: 10Y Treasury is populated and plausible

expected.ground_truth: 10Y has ranged 0.5-5.0% since 2020

cases.description: Yield curve data has all 5 maturities

expected.ground_truth: 5 maturities required for curve shape analysis

cases.description: Cap rate adjustments cover all 7 property types

expected.ground_truth: Industrial, Multifamily, Retail, Office, Healthcare, Self-Storage, Data Centers

cases.description: Construction cost signal is one of HIGH/MODERATE/LOW

expected.ground_truth: Signal must be one of three valid values

cases.description: All 5 commodities are tracked with valid SMA data

expected.condition: contains USO, UNG, XLE, CPER, SLX and all have sma_60 > 0
expected.ground_truth: 5 commodity ETFs with 60-day moving averages

cases.description: Signal HIGH when avg momentum > +5%

expected.ground_truth: Threshold: >+5% = HIGH

cases.description: Tenant demand signal score is 0-100

expected.ground_truth: Composite score bounded 0-100

cases.description: Demand signal label matches score thresholds

expected.condition: STRONG if score >= 65, MODERATE if 40-64, SOFT if < 40
expected.ground_truth: Label must be consistent with score

cases.description: Inflation signal is one of HOT/MODERATE/COOLING

expected.ground_truth: Signal must be one of three valid values

cases.description: Credit conditions signal is one of LOOSE/NEUTRAL/TIGHT

expected.ground_truth: Signal must be one of three valid values

cases.description: Extract Tesla Gigafactory from straightforward announcement
cases.input_article: Tesla announced plans for a $5 billion Gigafactory in Austin, Texas, expected to create more than 10,000 jobs over the next five years. The 2,500-acre facility will produce the Cybertruck and Model Y. Construction began in 2020.

cases.description: Extract TSMC semiconductor fab with large dollar amount
cases.input_article: TSMC, the world's largest contract chipmaker, confirmed a $65 billion investment to build three semiconductor fabrication plants in Phoenix, Arizona. The first fab began chip production in early 2025, with 6,000 direct jobs expected at full buildout.

cases.description: Extract from article with TWO facilities — should get both
cases.input_article: Eli Lilly will invest $9 billion to build four new manufacturing sites in Lebanon, Indiana for weight-loss and diabetes drugs, adding 1,000 jobs. Separately, Toyota announced a $13.9 billion battery plant in Liberty, North Carolina, creating 5,000 jobs to supply its EV production line.

cases.description: Extract data center from Microsoft with vague job count
cases.input_article: Microsoft plans to invest approximately $80 billion in fiscal year 2025 to build out AI-capable data centers across the United States and globally. The company did not disclose specific job creation numbers but said the investment would support its Azure cloud and Copilot AI services.

cases.description: Extract EV plant with company name containing slash
cases.input_article: Hyundai Motor Group, which includes Hyundai and Kia, opened its $7.6 billion Metaplant America electric vehicle assembly facility in Bryan County near Savannah, Georgia. The plant is expected to employ 8,500 workers at full capacity.

cases.description: Extract from ambiguous million/billion amount ($500M not $500B)
cases.input_article: Nucor Corporation will build a $500 million steel plate mill in Brandenburg, Kentucky. The facility will create approximately 400 full-time jobs and is expected to begin operations in late 2026. Nucor chose Kentucky for its access to river transportation and skilled labor.

cases.description: Avoid hallucinating details not in the article
cases.input_article: Amazon Web Services announced plans to expand its data center operations in Northern Virginia. The company did not disclose the investment amount or number of jobs. AWS currently operates over 100 data centers in the region.

cases.description: Extract warehouse/distribution facility correctly typed
cases.input_article: FedEx Ground announced a new $300 million regional distribution hub in San Antonio, Texas. The 1.2-million-square-foot facility will sort up to 100,000 packages per day and create 2,000 jobs. Operations are expected to begin in Q3 2026.

cases.description: Extract HQ relocation — should not hallucinate jobs or investment
cases.input_article: Caterpillar Inc. completed its corporate headquarters relocation from Deerfield, Illinois to Irving, Texas in 2022. The company cited Texas's business-friendly environment. No new construction investment was announced as the company leased existing office space.

cases.description: Extract from article with R&D facility and specific CHIPS Act mention
cases.input_article: Intel will invest $20 billion to build two new semiconductor fabs at its Ohio One campus in New Albany, Ohio, as part of the CHIPS and Science Act. The project will create 3,000 permanent jobs and 7,000 construction jobs. Production is expected to begin in 2026.
